name: Attach Rigid Body To Tool
description: Attach a RigidBody (workpiece) to a tool inside a RobotCellState. TargetMode.WORKPIECE will resolve to the body's frame.

inputParameters.name: rigid_body_id
inputParameters.description: Id of the rigid body inside the RobotCell.

inputParameters.name: tool_id
inputParameters.description: Id of the tool the body is attached to.

inputParameters.name: attachment_plane
inputParameters.description: Optional grasp frame: body pose relative to the tool's TCF. Defaults to World XY (body at the tool tip).

outputParameters.name: cell_state
outputParameters.description: New RobotCellState with the body attached to the tool.
